name: China
headline: China CARRY-FORWARD CONFIRMATION at 20.3 / Developing — Rotation backfill cycle. Scanner-flagged baseline (15.3) is incorrect; verified countries.json baseline is 20.3 / Developing (boundary-adjacent: 0.3pt above 20/21 Critical/Developing boundary). May 17 evidence sustains baseline: HRW/Amnesty Uyghur/Xinjiang documentation continues; Hong Kong national-security-law restrictions sustained; Tibet human-rights situation unchanged; CCP centennial-trajectory governance posture stable. No new May 17 entity-specific event warrants score change. Boundary status warrants close monitoring: 0.3pt buffer above Critical floor (20/21) means any single quarter-step dimensional downgrade could trigger band crossing. Confirm at 20.3 / Developing.

AWR.rationale: Sustained. State-level recognition infrastructure operational for state-defined welfare priorities; constrained recognition of rights-based civil-society documentation.

EMP.rationale: Sustained. EMP infrastructure functions through state-channel welfare delivery; Uyghur/Tibet/Hong Kong differential application persists.

ACT.rationale: Sustained. AC2 proportionality: state capacity-action alignment operational at scale; AC4 resource mobilization functional (poverty alleviation, infrastructure, health system).

EQU.rationale: Sustained. Han-vs-minority differential treatment patterns continue (Uyghur, Tibetan, Mongol); urban-rural EQU gap persists.

BND.rationale: Sustained. IHRL framework engagement constrained (UPR participation but selective implementation); IHL framework engagement minimal.

ACC.rationale: Floor sustained. No independent judicial accountability for state conduct; refusal to cooperate with UN OHCHR Xinjiang follow-up; civil-society documentation suppressed.

SYS.rationale: Sustained. Systems-of-care operational at scale (healthcare, education, infrastructure) but with structural-exclusion zones (Xinjiang surveillance, Hong Kong NSL, Tibet).

INT.rationale: Floor sustained. Governance posture under pressure shows consistent prioritization of state-stability over rights-protection; INT-dimension consistency-under-pressure threshold not met.

evidence.summary: Scanner-flagged baseline (15.3) is incorrect; verified countries.json baseline is 20.3 / Developing. Boundary-adjacent status documented: 0.3pt above Critical/Developing (20/21) boundary.
HRW World Report 2026: China — Xinjiang surveillance state continues; Hong Kong national-security-law prosecutions sustained; Tibet restrictions ongoing.
Amnesty International ongoing Uyghur/Xinjiang documentation infrastructure; UN OHCHR 2022 Xinjiang report findings remain canonical Tier-5 evidence anchor.
No new May 17 entity-specific governance event warranting score change; rotation-backfill confirmation cycle.

keyEvidence: Rotation backfill cycle; baseline corrected from scanner's 15.3 to verified 20.3.
ACC and INT at floor; AWR/EMP/BND/SYS provide compensating positive dimensional weight.
rationale: Confirm at 20.3 / Developing. China's published baseline reflects mixed-conduct profile: state-capacity dimensions (ACT, SYS) provide compensating positive weight against accountability and integrity dimensions at floor (ACC, INT). The 0.3pt buffer above the Critical/Developing boundary warrants close monitoring — any single quarter-step downgrade on AWR/EMP/EQU/BND/SYS could trigger band crossing. Rotation backfill cycle finds no new May 17 entity-specific event. Math: (2+2+2.5+1.5+2+1+2.5+1)/8 = 14.5/8 = 1.8125 → ((1.8125-1)/4)*100 = 20.3125 → 20.3.
watches: Boundary status: 0.3pt above Critical/Developing (20/21) — any quarter-step dimensional downgrade triggers band crossing
UN OHCHR Xinjiang follow-up engagement signal
carryForward: UN OHCHR 2022 Xinjiang report as canonical Tier-5 evidence anchor
Mixed-conduct profile: state-capacity ACT/SYS vs ACC/INT floor
Boundary-adjacent status (0.3pt above 20/21) requiring close monitoring
Han-vs-minority EQU-dimension structural differential treatment pattern
boundaryWatchResolution: BOUNDARY CASE flagged: 0.3pt above Critical/Developing (20/21). Quarter-step dimensional downgrade scenarios: any single dimension reduction (e.g., EMP 2.0→1.75, EQU 1.5→1.25, BND 2.0→1.75) would yield composites within 19.0-19.7 range, triggering band crossing to Critical.

math_check.validator_check: Math clean. Confirmation cycle. Boundary case flagged.

disclaimer: This assessment is based on publicly available information and does not constitute a formal Compassion Benchmark Certified Assessment.
